description: Pallavi demo ticket set — category/department expectations from user table

cases.title: VPN Authentication Timeout
cases.description: VPN drops connection every 30 mins with Auth-Timeout error.
cases.notes: LLD: VPN → Network (H1 when trusted RAG)

cases.title: Primary DC Power Fluctuation
cases.description: UPS reporting voltage instability in Server Rack 4.

cases.title: Wi-Fi dead zone in Floor 3
cases.description: Wi-Fi signal drops completely near the conference room B.
cases.notes: LLD: Wi-Fi coverage → Network (H1 when trusted RAG)

cases.title: API response 500 error
cases.description: GET /v1/user-profile returns 500 when profile is empty.

cases.title: App crash on startup
cases.description: Application freezes at the splash screen on macOS Sonoma.

cases.title: Missing email notifications
cases.description: Users are not receiving system alerts via Outlook SMTP.

cases.title: Unauthorized file access
cases.description: User reported being able to view folders they shouldn't access.

cases.title: Phishing email reported
cases.description: Several employees received a fake link from IT Support.

cases.title: Certificate expiry warning
cases.description: SSL certificate for internal dev portal expires in 3 days.

cases.title: Deadlock on Transaction
cases.description: Sales report query failing due to row-level locking.

cases.title: Full Disk Error
cases.description: SQL Server transaction logs have consumed 99% of disk space.

cases.title: Slow data import
cases.description: ETL job for CSV import is taking 4 hours instead of 30 mins.

cases.title: Onboarding - New User
cases.description: Provision Active Directory account for new hire, John Doe.

cases.title: Revoke former employee
cases.description: Employee terminated; please disable all system access.

cases.title: Password Reset - Portal
cases.description: User forgotten password for the internal payroll portal.
cases.notes: User table: Access Management password reset
